veil.description: Privacy and shielded transactions on Base via Veil Cash (veil.cash). Deposit ETH into a private pool, withdraw/transfer privately using ZK proofs. Manage Veil keypairs, check private/queue balances, and submit deposits via Bankr.
capabilities: status check: config, registration, relay health
deposit via Bankr (builds unsigned tx for Bankr to sign & submit)
private withdraw, transfer, merge (executed locally with VEIL_KEY + ZK proofs)
Bankr integration for public → shielded flow
veil.invocation: natural language via ClawnX (e.g. 'shield 0.05 ETH with veil', 'private transfer 0.01 to 0x...', 'check veil balance')

near_intents.description: Cross-chain asset swaps via NEAR Intents 1Click API[](https://1click.chaindefuser.com). Supports 18+ chains (Base, Solana, ETH, NEAR, BTC, ARB, OP, AVAX, etc). Get supported tokens, generate quotes with deposit address/memo, check swap status, submit deposit tx hash, view withdrawals. JWT-auth protected.
capabilities: list all supported tokens across chains with prices
generate swap quote (EXACT_INPUT / EXACT_OUTPUT / FLEX_INPUT / ANY_INPUT) with deposit address & memo
check real-time swap status (PENDING → SUCCESS → REFUNDED)
submit deposit tx hash to accelerate processing
slippage tolerance, refund handling, referral tracking
seamless Base ↔ Solana ↔ NEAR etc flows
near_intents.invocation: natural language via ClawnX (e.g. 'swap 1 ETH Base to SOL via near_intents', 'quote 500 USDC to wNEAR dry run', 'check status of deposit 0x...', 'get all supported tokens')
constraints: never expose private keys or JWT
combine with Veil for fully shielded cross-chain moves
